CustomField.description: Stores the 18-character Record Type ID of the Opportunity Record Type assigned to installment Opportunities created by Recurring Donations. If blank, installment Opportunities use the running user's default Opportunity Record Type. Set this to ensure consistent Record Type assignment regardless of who triggers the batch job.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Record Type ID for Opportunities created by Recurring Donations. If blank, uses the user's default Opportunity Record Type.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Record Type
